PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\User\\Documents\\Sentinel\\V1\\backend"; Start-Process -FilePath ".venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -ArgumentList "-m","uvicorn","app.main:app","--reload","--port","8000" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/health" -TimeoutSec 5\).StatusCode } catch { "Backend not ready yet" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/health" -TimeoutSec 5; $r.StatusCode } catch { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/docs" -TimeoutSec 5; "docs: " + $r.StatusCode } catch { "Port 8000 not responding" } })

Bash(curl -s http://localhost:11434/api/chat -d '{"model":"sentinel:latest","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"Reply with only valid JSON: {\\"answer\\": \\"ok\\"}"}],"stream":false,"options":{"temperature":0,"num_predict":50,"think":false}}')

Bash(curl -s http://localhost:11434/api/chat -d '{"model":"sentinel:latest","messages":[{"role":"system","content":"Output ONLY valid JSON: {\\"severity\\": \\"info|warn|critical\\", \\"explanation\\": \\"...\\", \\"action\\": \\"...\\"}"},{"role":"user","content":"DNS change: {\\"domain\\": \\"example.com\\", \\"record_type\\": \\"DMARC\\", \\"change_type\\": \\"removed\\", \\"previous_value\\": \\"v=DMARC1; p=reject\\", \\"current_value\\": null}\\n\\nClassify the risk."}],"stream":false,"options":{"temperature":0,"num_predict":150}}')

Bash(curl -s http://localhost:11434/api/chat -d '{"model":"sentinel:latest","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"Classify this DNS risk as JSON with keys severity, explanation, action. DMARC record removed from example.com."}],"stream":false,"options":{"temperature":0,"num_predict":150}}')
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; r=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('CONTENT:', r['message']['content'][:400]\); print\('THINKING:', r['message'].get\('thinking',''\)[:100]\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; r=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('CONTENT:', repr\(r['message']['content'][:200]\)\); print\('DONE REASON:', r.get\('done_reason'\)\); print\('THINKING_LEN:', len\(r['message'].get\('thinking',''\)\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; r=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('CONTENT:', repr\(r['message']['content'][:300]\)\); print\('DONE:', r.get\('done_reason'\)\)")

Bash(curl -s http://localhost:11434/api/chat -d '{"model":"sentinel:latest","messages":[{"role":"system","content":"Output ONLY valid JSON: {\\"severity\\": \\"info|warn|critical\\", \\"explanation\\": \\"...\\", \\"action\\": \\"...\\"}"},{"role":"user","content":"DMARC record removed from example.com. Classify the risk."}],"stream":false,"options":{"temperature":0}}')
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; r=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('DONE:', r.get\('done_reason'\)\); print\('CONTENT:', r['message']['content'][:400]\)")

Bash(curl -s http://localhost:11434/api/chat -d "{\\"model\\":\\"sentinel:latest\\",\\"messages\\":[{\\"role\\":\\"system\\",\\"content\\":\\"You are Sentinel Advisor, an email security intelligence assistant embedded in the Sentinel platform.\\nYou receive live email security data for a domain or portfolio and return ONE short advisory in JSON.\\n\\nOutput format — ONLY this JSON, nothing else:\\n{\\\\\\"message\\\\\\": \\\\\\"...\\\\\\", \\\\\\"commend\\\\\\": false, \\\\\\"citations\\\\\\": []}\\n\\nRules:\\n- message: exactly 1-2 sentences. Plain prose. No bullets. No markdown.\\n- commend: true ONLY when fully protected \(dmarc_stage=reject AND tls_stage=enforce AND compliance >= 98\).\\n- citations: [] unless you reference an RFC.\\n- Use ONLY the numbers and facts given. Never invent values.\\n- The DMARC policy progression is: none \\\\u2192 quarantine \\\\u2192 reject. Never say \\\\\\"proceed to\\\\\\" a stage the domain is already at.\\n- When dmarc_stage=none: recommend publishing p=none to start collecting data.\\n- When dmarc_stage=quarantine: acknowledge current quarantine and recommend advancing to p=reject after 30 clean days.\\n- When dmarc_stage=reject: commend and say to keep monitoring for new sources.\\n- When tls_stage=none: recommend publishing MTA-STS in testing mode.\\n- When tls_stage=testing: recommend advancing to enforce if pass rate >= 98%.\\n- When tls_stage=enforce: note it as protected.\\n- Lead with the most urgent issue. Be specific: use the domain name, quote the compliance percentage.\\"},{\\"role\\":\\"user\\",\\"content\\":\\"Domain security context: {\\\\\\"screen\\\\\\": \\\\\\"dmarc\\\\\\", \\\\\\"domain\\\\\\": \\\\\\"example.co.za\\\\\\", \\\\\\"dmarc_stage\\\\\\": \\\\\\"quarantine\\\\\\", \\\\\\"dmarc_compliance_pct\\\\\\": 94.2, \\\\\\"tls_stage\\\\\\": \\\\\\"testing\\\\\\", \\\\\\"tls_pass_pct\\\\\\": 98.1, \\\\\\"failing_sources\\\\\\": [\\\\\\"Mailchimp\\\\\\", \\\\\\"SendGrid\\\\\\"], \\\\\\"min_cert_days_remaining\\\\\\": 45, \\\\\\"portfolio_total\\\\\\": 3, \\\\\\"at_reject\\\\\\": 1, \\\\\\"unprotected\\\\\\": 0}\\n\\nProvide advisor output JSON.\\"}],\\"stream\\":false,\\"options\\":{\\"temperature\\":0}}")

Bash(curl -s http://localhost:11434/api/chat -d "{\\"model\\":\\"sentinel:latest\\",\\"messages\\":[{\\"role\\":\\"system\\",\\"content\\":\\"You are Sentinel Advisor. Return ONLY this JSON — no explanation, no extra text:\\n{\\\\\\"message\\\\\\": \\\\\\"one or two plain-English sentences of specific advice\\\\\\", \\\\\\"commend\\\\\\": false, \\\\\\"citations\\\\\\": []}\\n\\nKey rules:\\n- commend=true only if dmarc_stage=reject AND tls_stage=enforce.\\n- DMARC stages in order: none \\\\u2192 quarantine \\\\u2192 reject.\\n- When dmarc_stage=quarantine: say domain is at quarantine and needs 30 clean days before advancing to reject.\\n- When dmarc_stage=none: recommend publishing p=none.\\n- When dmarc_stage=reject: commend and note to monitor for new sources.\\n- Use exact numbers from the context. Never invent. Max 2 sentences.\\"},{\\"role\\":\\"user\\",\\"content\\":\\"Context: {\\\\\\"screen\\\\\\": \\\\\\"posture_dmarc\\\\\\", \\\\\\"portfolio_total\\\\\\": 4, \\\\\\"at_reject\\\\\\": 1, \\\\\\"unprotected\\\\\\": 1, \\\\\\"avg_compliance\\\\\\": 87.3}\\n\\nProvide advisor JSON.\\"}],\\"stream\\":false,\\"options\\":{\\"temperature\\":0}}")

Bash(curl -s http://localhost:11434/api/chat -d '{"model":"sentinel:latest","messages":[{"role":"system","content":"You are Sentinel Advisor. Output ONLY this JSON — no extra text before or after:\\n{"message": "...", "commend": false, "citations": []}\\n\\nRules:\\n- message: 1-2 plain English sentences. Specific and actionable. Use the exact numbers provided.\\n- commend: true only when DMARC policy is p=reject AND MTA-STS is enforce mode.\\n- DMARC stages in order from weakest to strongest: none → quarantine → reject.\\n- If DMARC policy is p=none: advise publishing a monitoring record and aligning sending sources.\\n- If DMARC policy is p=quarantine: say it is at quarantine and the next step is advancing to p=reject after 30 days with no false positives.\\n- If DMARC policy is p=reject: confirm it is fully enforced and advise monitoring for new sources.\\n- If unprotected domains exist: prioritise publishing DMARC records for them.\\n- Never suggest a stage the domain is already at."},{"role":"user","content":"Screen: dmarc\\nDomain: example.co.za\\nDMARC policy: p=quarantine\\nDMARC compliance rate: 94.2% of messages pass DMARC\\nMTA-STS mode: testing\\nTLS pass rate: 98.1%\\nSending sources failing DMARC: Mailchimp, SendGrid\\n\\nProvide advisor output JSON."}],"stream":false,"options":{"temperature":0}}')

Bash(time curl -s -X POST http://localhost:11434/api/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"model":"sentinel:latest","stream":false,"messages":[{"role":"user","content":"Screen: dmarc\\nDomain: test.com\\nDAMARC policy: p=none\\nDAMARC compliance rate: 72.5% of messages pass DMARC\\nSending sources failing DMARC: legacy-mailer.partner.com\\n\\nProvide advisor output JSON. /no_think"}],"options":{"temperature":0}}')

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Content:', d.get\('message',{}\).get\('content',''\)\); print\('Thinking:', len\(d.get\('message',{}\).get\('thinking',''\) or ''\),'chars'\)")

Bash(time curl -s -X POST http://localhost:11434/api/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"model":"sentinel:latest","stream":false,"messages":[{"role":"user","content":"Screen: posture\\nPortfolio: 8 domains total\\nDomains at p=reject \(fully enforced\): 5\\nDomains with no DMARC record \(unprotected\): 2\\nDomains at p=none or p=quarantine \(in progress\): 1\\n\\nProvide advisor output JSON. /no_think"}],"options":{"temperature":0}}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:11434/api/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"model":"sentinel:latest","stream":false,"messages":[{"role":"system","content":"You are Sentinel Advisor. Output ONLY this JSON — no extra text before or after:\\n{\\"message\\": \\"...\\", \\"commend\\": false, \\"citations\\": []}\\n\\nRules:\\n- message: 1-2 plain English sentences. Specific and actionable. Use the exact numbers provided.\\n- commend: true only when DMARC policy is p=reject AND MTA-STS is enforce mode.\\n- DMARC stages in order from weakest to strongest: none → quarantine → reject.\\n- If DMARC policy is p=none: advise publishing a monitoring record and aligning sending sources.\\n- If DMARC policy is p=quarantine: say it is at quarantine and the next step is advancing to p=reject after 30 days with no false positives.\\n- If DMARC policy is p=reject: confirm it is fully enforced and advise monitoring for new sources.\\n- If unprotected domains exist: prioritise publishing DMARC records for them.\\n- Never suggest a stage the domain is already at."},{"role":"user","content":"Screen: dmarc\\nDomain: foundationcraft.co.za\\nDAMARC policy: p=none\\nDAMARC compliance rate: 84.2% of messages pass DMARC\\nSending sources failing DMARC: google.com, mailchimp.com\\n\\nProvide advisor output JSON. /no_think"}],"options":{"temperature":0}}')
